_publications._publicationTitle: Cabozantinib for neurofibromatosis type 1-related plexiform neurofibromas: a phase 2 trial.

_contextSnippet: There was no significant change (p<0.01) over time in the PedsQL NF1 Total Functioning mean score (validated for adolescents and adults with NF1 at any evaluation from baseline to cycle 12 for the total sample (LSM estimate=−2.83; t=−0.85, p=0.40)
details: No significant change (p<0.01) over time in the PedsQL NF1 Total Functioning mean score from baseline to cycle 12 for the total sample (LSM estimate=−2.83; t=−0.85, p=0.40)
